verified.notes: No income or asset limits mentioned in sources; program excludes Medicaid-eligible care recipients. NYFSC is a nonprofit citing state funding.

verified.notes: Program eligibility requires family income of no more than 125% of federal poverty level. Income limits calculated from 2025 federal poverty guidelines (125% of $1,083/month for individual = $1,354; 125% of $1,458/month for couple of 2 = $1,823). CRITICAL: Search results indicate potential program elimination effective July 1, 2026 (upcoming program year) per NY State aging services update, though this is not yet finalized as of April 2026. Phone number is NYC Aging Connect line for employment services referral.

Phone number is NYC Aging Connect line for employment services referral.
